title: Roan (disambiguation)
content:
'''Roan''' could refer to several different individuals:
*'''[[Roan]]''', Supreme Governor of the planet [[New Apsolon/Legends|New Apsolon]]
*'''[[Roan Fel]]''', third Emperor of the [[Fel dynasty]] to rule the [[Fel Empire|Galactic Empire]]
*'''[[Roan Lands]]''', co-founder of [[Olin and Lands]]
*'''[[Roan Novachez]]''', [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Youngling/Legends|youngling]]
*'''[[Roan Shryne]]''', [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]
{{Disambig}}

|de=Roan
|fi=Roan (täsmennyssivu)
